messages.subject: [RsR] Fahrmeir and Tutz (1994)
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

I have one non-robustness related question - does somebody know about
an R package implementing the examples from the book:

Ludwig Fahrmeir and Gerhard Tutz (1994) "Multivariate Statistical
Modeling Based on Generalized Linear Models"

I am aware about the package 'Fahrmeir', but it contains only the data sets.

Thanks,
Best regards,

Valentin
